entity.summary: Sui decentralized exchange providing spot liquidity pools, order-book and perpetual trading, collateralized accounts, and programmatic trading clients.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates the DipCoin Spot discovery row with the broader DipCoin exchange entity rather than splitting spot and perpetual products. First-party CLI documentation updated in May 2026 describes live account funding, market data, order books, spot and perpetual trading, positions, withdrawals, and vault operations. A current DefiLlama adapter retrieves spot volume and fees from api.dipcoin.io at run time.

evidence.title: How to Trade on DipCoin with dipcoin-cli
evidence.notes: Current first-party guide documents installation, Sui wallet setup, DEX deposits and withdrawals, markets, order books, spot and perpetual trading, positions, order history, and vault workflows.

evidence.title: DipCoin Spot DefiLlama volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current-running adapter retrieves spot volume, pools, and 24-hour fees from api.dipcoin.io and is configured to run at the current time on Sui.
